title: Education & School Life
description: Learn vocabulary and grammar for talking about education, school subjects, and studying. Practice the verb 'učit se' (to learn) with the accusative, 'studovat' (to study) with 'na' + locative, and common school-related expressions.

exercises.prompt: What does the reflexive verb 'učit se' mean in Czech?

data.question_en: What does the reflexive verb 'učit se' mean?
data.explanation: 'Učit se' = to learn / to study (for oneself). Without 'se', 'učit' means 'to teach'. Example: 'Učím se česky.' = I am learning Czech. 'Učím češtinu.' = I teach Czech. The 'se' makes it reflexive — the action is directed at oneself.

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence: 'Studuji ___ univerzitě.' (I study at the university.)

data.explanation: 'Na' + locative is used for institutions like schools and universities: 'na univerzitě' (at the university), 'na škole' (at school), 'na gymnáziu' (at the grammar school). 'Studuji na univerzitě.' = I study at the university.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the accusative form of 'čeština' (Czech language): 'Učím se ___.

data.explanation: 'Učit se' takes the accusative case for the thing being learned: čeština → češtinu. 'Učím se češtinu.' = I am learning Czech. You can also say 'Učím se česky' (with the adverb 'česky' = in Czech).

exercises.prompt: Fill in the correct form of 'studovat' (to study) for 'ona': 'Ona ___ na gymnáziu.'

data.explanation: 'Studovat' is a regular -ovat verb. 3rd person singular: studuje. 'Ona studuje na gymnáziu.' = She studies at the grammar school. 'Na' + locative: gymnázium → gymnáziu.

exercises.prompt: Translate to Czech: 'I am learning Czech.'

data.grammar_note: 'Učit se' + accusative: 'Učím se češtinu.' (čeština → češtinu). You can also use the adverb form: 'Učím se česky.' Both are common. 'Učím' = 1st person singular of 'učit se'.

exercises.prompt: Translate to English: 'Máme zkoušku z matematiky.'

accepted_answers: We have an exam in mathematics.
data.grammar_note: 'Zkouška' = exam/test. 'Z' + genitive indicates the subject of the exam: 'z matematiky' = in math/mathematics. 'Máme' = we have (1st person plural of 'mít').

exercises.prompt: Complete the dialogue between two students talking about school.

data.scenario: Ve škole — At school. Two students discuss their subjects and an upcoming exam.

lines.speaker: person_a
lines.text: Já mám historii a angličtinu. Máme zítra zkoušku?

lines.speaker: person_b
lines.text: Ano, máme zkoušku z matematiky. Musím se hodně učit.

data.explanation: 'Jaké předměty' = which subjects (předmět = subject). 'Mám matematiku a fyziku' = I have math and physics (accusative after 'mít'). 'Zkouška z matematiky' = exam in math (z + genitive). 'Musím se hodně učit' = I have to study a lot.
blank_answers: Mám matematiku a fyziku. A ty?
Mám matematiku a fyziku. A co ty?

exercises.answer_key: Mám matematiku a fyziku. A ty?

exercises.prompt: Match each Czech school subject with its English translation.

data.instructions_cz: Spojte české školní předměty s anglickým překladem.
data.instructions_en: Match each Czech school subject with its English translation.
data.explanation: These are core school subjects in Czech. Other subjects: 'biologie' (biology), 'zeměpis' (geography), 'jazyk' (language), 'výtvarná výchova' (art), 'tělesná výchova' (PE).

exercises.prompt: Match each Czech school item with its English translation.

data.instructions_cz: Spojte české školní potřeby s anglickým překladem.
data.instructions_en: Match each Czech school item with its English translation.

exercises.prompt: Find and correct the error in this sentence.

data.hint: Think about which case 'na' requires for locations.
data.explanation: 'Na' + locative case for institutions/locations: škola → škole. 'Studuju na škole.' = I study at school. The error was using the nominative 'škola' instead of the locative 'škole'. Similarly: 'na univerzitě', 'na gymnáziu'.

exercises.prompt: Listen and write what you hear.

data.expected_text: Učím se česky na univerzitě. Máme zkoušku z matematiky.
data.note: Listen for 'učím se' (I learn), 'na univerzitě' (at the university — na + locative), 'zkoušku z matematiky' (exam in math — z + genitive).

exercises.answer_key: Učím se česky na univerzitě. Máme zkoušku z matematiky.

exercises.prompt: Pronounce the following sentence about school life.

data.target_text: Studuji na univerzitě a učím se česky.
data.translation_en: I study at the university and I am learning Czech.

exercises.answer_key: Studuji na univerzitě a učím se česky.
